initialPrompt: You are a bot able to read cards. I need you to read the attached card and provide me the type of card. You'll find it on the top and should be either Unit, Event, Upgrade, Base or Leader. Only return the type.

properties.description: Top left of the card
Top, either Unit, Upgrade or Event
To the right of Card Type, either Space, Ground
Under type and location
Optionally, under the name
Located in the red icon in the middle of the image
Located in the blue icon in the middle of the image
Located between Power and Health, seperated by dots
Located under tags in the big area. Surround bold text with the | character.

Located below the cost, can be multiple icons. Depending on the colors, return the following values: Red circular icon = Aggression, Blue icon = Vigilance, Green icon = Command, Yellow spiral icon = Cunning, Black Imperial-style icon = Villainy, White Rebel-style icon = Heroism. Return as a list seperated by commas.

Located in the bottom right corner between EN and the card number. Depending on the character shown, return the following values: S = Starter, C = Common, U = Uncommon, R = Rare, L = Legendary. If you don't see any, just return TODO. Otherwise ALWAYS return one of those values.
Top left of the card
Top, either Unit, Upgrade or Event
Under type
Located under the Name
Located under tags in the big area. Surround bold text with the | character.

Located below the cost, can be multiple icons. Depending on the colors, return the following values: Red circular icon = Aggression, Blue icon = Vigilance, Green icon = Command, Yellow spiral icon = Cunning, Black Imperial-style icon = Villainy, White Rebel-style icon = Heroism. Return as a list seperated by commas.

Read the rarity letter located between the language code (EN) and the card number in the bottom right of the card. The visible letter must be exactly one of: S, C, U, R, L. Convert it using: S = Starter, C = Common, U = Uncommon, R = Rare, L = Legendary. Return the full word, never the letter. If the letter cannot be read with confidence, return TODO.

backSideProperties.description: Located in the main area. Surround bold text with the | character.
Located below the hero abilities. Everything after 'Epic Action'. Don't include the 'Epic Action' in your answer.

Read the rarity letter located between the language code (EN) and the card number in the bottom right of the card. The visible letter must be exactly one of: S, C, U, R, L. Convert it using: S = Starter, C = Common, U = Uncommon, R = Rare, L = Legendary. Return the full word, never the letter. If the letter cannot be read with confidence, return TODO.
